title: NClient
description: A No Compromises mod pack client and the base version.
body:
A simple light No Compromises client.
  rather than having **100** mods to get _better performence_ or need to give a client your mc account simply use NClient! **UNDER 30 MODS!** has **shader support!** **No Compromises!**

(there will not be any more vulkan releases for the base pack and instead will be on 
NClient -)
(the vulkan version has less mods but at the cost of shader support)
